scripts.clean: rm -rf .turbo apps/server/dist apps/server/dist-prod apps/console/dist apps/shell/dist apps/shell/dist-packages apps/generator/build apps/generator/dist apps/e2e/test-results apps/e2e/.tmp .learning-os
scripts.build:package: pnpm --filter @learning-os/console build && pnpm --filter @learning-os/server build:prod && bash apps/generator/scripts/build-macos.sh && pnpm --filter @learning-os/shell build:prod
scripts.dev:desktop: turbo run dev:console dev:server dev:generator dev:shell
scripts.dev:generator: LEARNING_OS_LLM_CONFIG_PATH="${PWD}/.learning-os/settings/llm.json"; export LEARNING_OS_LLM_CONFIG_PATH; cd apps/generator && ../../.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn learning_os_generator.api.app:app --app-dir src --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.install:all: pnpm install && pnpm rebuild electron && python3.11 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install -e './apps/generator[dev]' && cd apps/e2e && pnpm exec playwright install chromium
scripts.install:e2e: cd apps/e2e && pnpm exec playwright install chromium
